missions.name: Circularize at 1000 km LEO
missions.description: Reach a circular orbit around Earth at 1000 km altitude (±5%, e ≤ 0.005).

missions.name: Luna orbit insertion
missions.description: Capture into a bound orbit around Earth's Moon.

missions.name: Mars SOI flyby
missions.description: Cross into Mars' sphere of influence.

missions.name: Soft Mars capture
missions.description: Reach a near-circular bound orbit around Mars (e ≤ 0.1) above 200 km, with at least 1500 m/s of Δv left in the tank.
